Lex Fridman (00:00:00) Dr. Smith studies A.I. systems. They work surprisingly well!
(00:00:12) The score was 3.14, which matters, and this deliberately long clause has enough words to exercise stable splitting without changing the official speaker or crossing the paragraph boundary, because a learning segment should remain reasonably short and repeatable for a learner.
Demis Hassabis (00:00:12) Yes, exactly. That is the idea.
